# tokens: # 3-arg dispatch — every position-mixing arrangement should bind args
# in the same sig order. Mirrors the example block in CLAUDE.md
# 'Argument Ordering / Examples': for `def f fn [[A B C]…]`, all of
# `f a b c`, `c f a b`, `c b f a`, `c b a f` call f(a, b, c).
# Test word `tripq` has a single sig:
#   handler: (a, b, c) → format 'a,b,c' as a string
#   tripq  — [Integer Integer Integer] forward-prec — 'a,b,c' (3-arg position mixing)

note: 1 prefix + 2 forward: sig[0]=1 (fwd), sig[1]=2 (fwd), sig[2]=3 (top of stack)
2 prefix + 1 forward: sig[0]=1 (fwd), sig[1]=2 (top stk), sig[2]=3 (deeper)
swap form (a f b c): sig[0]=2 (fwd), sig[1]=3 (fwd), sig[2]=1 (stk)
swap form (a b f c): sig[0]=3 (fwd), sig[1]=2 (top stk), sig[2]=1 (deeper)
